pi_items.source: Task setup script copies ODB from /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb to /home/ga/chinook.odb during setup
String literal value verified against actual Chinook database artists table containing multiple artists with this prefix
String literal value, inherently correct as the expected replacement suffix
Official Chinook database GitHub repository (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) - Artist ID 127 has name 'Red Hot Chili Peppers' without 'The ' prefix
Based on corrected original name (Red Hot Chili Peppers), this transformation is correct
Official Chinook database - Artist ID 139 has name 'The Cult'
Correct transformation of 'The Cult' to 'Cult, The' format
Official Chinook database - Artist ID 140 has name 'The Doors'
Correct transformation of 'The Doors' to 'Doors, The' format
Official Chinook database - Artist ID 141 has name 'The Police'
Correct transformation of 'The Police' to 'Police, The' format
Official Chinook database - Artist ID 142 has name 'The Rolling Stones'
Correct transformation of 'The Rolling Stones' to 'Rolling Stones, The' format
Official Chinook database - Artist ID 143 has name 'The Tea Party'
Correct transformation of 'The Tea Party' to 'Tea Party, The' format
Official Chinook database - Artist ID 144 has name 'The Who'
Correct transformation of 'The Who' to 'Who, The' format
Official Chinook database - Artist ID 1 is 'AC/DC' and does not start with 'The '
Official Chinook database - Artist ID 90 is 'Iron Maiden' and does not start with 'The '

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, open-source music store sample database maintained on GitHub (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database). The task uses the official Chinook SQLite database converted to LibreOffice Base ODB format. Most metadata sample check IDs are correct: ID 139 (The Cult), 140 (The Doors), 141 (The Police), 142 (The Rolling Stones), 143 (The Tea Party), and 144 (The Who) all match the official database. However, ID 127 contains an error: the metadata claims the original name is 'The Red Hot Chili Peppers', but the official database has 'Red Hot Chili Peppers' without the 'The ' prefix. The expected transformation format 'Name, The' and the two collateral damage checks (ID 1: AC/DC, ID 90: Iron Maiden) are correctly specified.
